name: io.github.SalZaki/doodleworks-mcp
title: Doodleworks MCP
description: Hand-drawn explainer illustrations in your AI host, via an MCP App with an interactive viewer.

environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OpenAI API key (default provider). Provide this or a Gemini key.

environmentVariables.name: GEMINI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Gemini API key (GOOGLE_API_KEY also works). Provide this or an OpenAI key.
